PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles for Petitioner.

The Court noted that the notice of hearing was filed the day before it says notice was given, and that the petition says the Decedent had the will at the time of his death and gave it to the petitioner. Ms. Peebles stated that she filed a declaration addressing the Probate Examiner's notes, that there was confusion at her office, that the notice was uploaded the evening of August 6th, that it was mailed on August 7th and that a filed endorsed copy of the notice was not mailed. The Court explained the electronic filing process/procedures. Ms. Peebles stated that no heirs have any issue with what they are trying to do, that they have had ample time, that the Parties received notice from the prior Attorney and that all Parties have received adequate notice. Ms. Peebles also stated that the Decedent had the will at the time of death, that following the Decedent's death the Daughter took possession of the will and gave it to her Attorney, that the Client gave the original will to the Attorney and that her Client does not know what happened to it after that. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lauren Peebles for Petitioner

The Court raised the issue that the Will lodged with the court appears to be a copy, and whether an amended petition to admit as a lost will should be filed. Ms. Peebles stated that her client and prior counsel both agreed that the original Will was delivered to the prior counsel. The Court noted that the declaration of prior counsel re: description of the Will does not match the Will lodged with the Court. Ms. Peebles stated that her client lives in San Diego, and requested a 60 day continuance since the only way for her client to view the lodged Will is to come to the courthouse The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary, etc. is continued to July 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Continued To May-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Continued To Apr-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2018 Continued To Apr-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by telephone for Arnetta Simon.

The Court noted that a personal appearance would have helpful as it wanted Counsel to look at the lodged will. Mr. Bresler stated that they have a mix up at the office/made a mistake at the office, that he sent a copy of the will with his Office Clerk to the Court clerk, that he believes the original will is lodged with the Court and asked for time to speak with the Court Clerk. The Court informed Counsel that the will he filed with the petition is not an original and appears to be a copy. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Testamentary is continued to April 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
